entries.text: Morning sleep briefing showed wrong Oura data — queried Feb 27 instead of Feb 28. Oura assigns sleep to wake-up date. Fix: pre-fetch Oura data in bot.js sleep briefing like crypto is pre-fetched, rather than relying on MCP query.
Late eating (9-10pm) confirmed as cause of poor sleep — woke at 6am naturally, couldn't fall back asleep. Deep sleep only 45min, readiness 68. Same pattern as Feb 21 late-meal sleep disruption.
Zapier MCP stalling on large doc uploads (1033 lines) — Claude runs out of context mid-task. Manual upload to Google Drive more reliable for large files.
